p1_critical.title: [Bug]: xiaomi mimo response only displays the last line
p1_critical.summary: Streaming response from mimo-v2-flash shows only last line. Affects v1.8.0.

p1_critical.title: [Bug]: [AI_APICallError: Resource not found] Could not call Azure OpenAI in the latest macOS app
p1_critical.summary: Azure OpenAI defaults to responses API instead of chat/completions since v1.7.22-1.7.23. Regression from v1.7.19.
